summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Identifiant France Travail feature. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all required components: registration form with FT ID field, partner search dialog with two search fields, search results with condition badges, and privacy settings with FT ID field and 3 conditions.
critical_code_review_comments: All Identifiant France Travail endpoints properly implemented
Privacy settings update with identifiant_france_travail works
Partner search endpoint returns has_dclic, profile_boosted, authorized fields
Search by identifiant_ft + name combination works correctly
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Condition badges (D'CLIC non passé, Profil non boosté, Conditions non remplies) display correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing bob23 user with visibility=limited and identifiant_france_travail=FT_BOB_123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Identifiant France Travail feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) Registration form shows FT ID field with 'Facultatif' badge. 2) Partner 'Demande d'accès' dialog has two search fields: 'Identifiant France Travail' and 'Nom et/ou prénom'. 3) Search results show condition badges: 'D'CLIC non passé' (orange), 'Profil non boosté' (orange), 'Conditions non remplies' (orange). 4) Privacy settings shows FT ID field when 'Limité' mode is selected, with 3 conditions listed. 5) bob23 user has visibility=limited but has_dclic=false, so authorized=false and shows 'Conditions non remplies' badge.

frontend_components: Registration form: Identifiant France Travail field (data-testid=register-ft-id-input) ✓
Partner Demande d'accès dialog: Identifiant France Travail field (data-testid=demande-acces-ft-input) ✓
Partner Demande d'accès dialog: Nom/Prénom field (data-testid=demande-acces-name-input) ✓
Search results: D'CLIC non passé badge ✓
Search results: Profil non boosté badge ✓
Search results: Conditions non remplies badge ✓
Privacy settings: Identifiant France Travail field (data-testid=ft-id-input) ✓
Privacy settings: 3 conditions (FT renseigné, D'CLIC passé, Profil boosté) ✓
